warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs
10 Band Row Rotate Press
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
10 Broad Jumps
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
3x2 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | 24min
BUILD 4 Sets E3MOM
00:00 8 @ 50%
03:00 6 @ 65%
06:00 4 @ 75%
09:00 2 @ 85%
HOLD 3 Sets E4MOM
12:00 2 @ 90%
16:00 2 @ 90%
20:00 2 @ 90%

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
1x2 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 15min
Work Up to a Top Set of 2. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 2
03:00 2
06:00 2
09:00 2
12:00 2

metcon.name: MLI 26.3 (as requested by Craig & Erik)
metcon.description:
Min 1: Max thrusters @40/30
Min 2: Max Box Jump Overs @24/20"
Min 3: Max KettleBell Swings (Russian but above eye level not too eye level) - 24/16kg
Min 4: Rest
Min 5: Max KettleBell Swings (24/16kg)
Min 6: Max Box Jump Overs @24/20"
Min 7: Max thrusters @40/30
Scaled - step overs, thrusters @ 30/25, KB 16/12kg
Rx+ - thrusters @ 45/35, KB @ 32/24
**get a chalk board

hypertrophy.reasoning: Quads, shoulders, triceps fatigued from front squats, cleans, and thrusters; posterior chain provides balance and GPP.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Front Squat, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Power Clean, 1 by 2. Metcon: MLI 26.3 (as requested by Craig & Erik). Workout: **get a chalk board. For hypertrophy, focus on back, hamstrings, biceps.
